flash.title: Flashlight
flash.description: Fires the camera flash on every shot

camera.title: Enable camera
camera.description: Uses the real camera for the AR background

classic.name: Classic
classic.description: Standard damage • Normal fire rate • 6-round mag

machineGun.name: Machine Gun
machineGun.description: Low damage • Very high fire rate • 24-round mag

shotgun.name: Shotgun
shotgun.description: Area damage • Slow fire rate • 5-round mag

turret.name: Turret
turret.description: Auto aim • High fire rate • 14-round mag

exitDialog.title: Leave the match?
exitDialog.message: Your current progress will be lost. Are you sure you want to leave?

noXR.intro: To play Word Invaders AR, you need:
noXR.browserText: Chrome, Edge or another browser with WebXR support
noXR.emulatorText: For development, use the WebXR Emulator extension in Chrome DevTools
